name: Pre-Deploy Checklist
description: Runs an automated go/no-go gate before a deployment: build, tests, lint, type checks, migration safety, secret leakage, and environment readiness, then issues a clear ship / hold verdict.
author: ClaudeStudio Deployment Pack

steps.title: Run gating checks
steps.prompt: Run the selected checks {{checks}} for a deploy to {{environment}}. For 'build' run `{{build_cmd}}`; for 'tests' run `{{test_cmd}}`; for 'lint' run the project's lint/type-check scripts if present. For 'secrets' grep the pending diff and tracked config for API keys, tokens, private keys and passwords. For 'migrations' inspect pending DB migrations for destructive or non-reversible operations (drop column/table, non-nullable column without default, large table rewrites). For 'env' confirm the variables referenced in config exist for the {{environment}} target. Record each as pass/warn/fail with evidence.

steps.title: Go / no-go verdict
steps.prompt: Produce a Markdown deployment gate report for {{environment}}: a results table (check / status / detail), a 'Blockers' list (any fail), a 'Warnings' list, and a final bold verdict: SHIP if no blockers, otherwise HOLD with the reasons. Be conservative for production: any unresolved secret leak or destructive migration is an automatic HOLD.
